architectureDecision.label: Dual-worktree automated test
architectureDecision.rationale: Integration test with two worktrees validates phase notes, ideas, module state, and domain toggles; physical laptops optional.

readyReview.decision: Dual-worktree automated test required; matches Phase 119 (T100576) evidence bar.

technicalBreakdown: Add cross-domain hydrate golden fixture test (task + planning Phase 120 domains).
Add dual-worktree tests for phase note, idea, and module state publish/hydrate.
Add test that disabling a domain via planning.canonicalSync.domains skips publish/hydrate.
Run full test suite; attach CI/local output to task completion notes.

acceptanceCriteria: All automated test gates pass with Phase 120 domains enabled.
Automated dual-worktree test proves phase note, idea, and module state convergence after fetch + hydrate.
Disabling a domain via planning.canonicalSync.domains prevents publish and hydrate for that domain.
Phase 119 scenarios remain green with expanded stream.
